sections.chapter_title: Notifications Regarding Change of Accounting Reference Date

rules.summary: A firm must notify the PRA if it changes its accounting reference date by submitting the form referred to in [Notifications 10.2](/pra-rules/notifications#acd2de2ec60149b08c260292cb64a7c7 "Notif
When a firm extends its accounting period, it must make the notification in 18.1 before the previous _accounting reference
When a firm shortens its accounting period, it must make the notification in 18.1 before the new _accounting reference date
